intent: Write a 3-source market brief on 'winter gear for first-time snow-country residents'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the clothing-shoes-jewelry and sports-outdoors categories and collect at least 4 products (jacket, base layer, gloves, boots). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/LifeProTips AND /f/AskReddit for posts on layering systems, common newbie mistakes, or brand traps. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open the 'Thermal insulation' and 'Layered clothing' (or nearest equivalents) articles and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) present storefront picks with stats, (b) justify the layering strategy with Wikipedia science, (c) flag any storefront product the community would reject, (d) close with a 3-layer uniform for a -10 C day. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Hard 3-site. Winter gear with thermal-insulation grounding.
